Workflow.name: Workflow-OrphanCorrelationApproval
Workflow.Description: Approval workflow for orphan account correlation. Supports three approval targets: manager only, identity only, or both (identity confirms first, then manager approves). Launched programmatically by the OrphanCorrelator plugin.

Variable.name: orcNativeIdentity
Variable.Description: Native identity (sAMAccountName) of the orphan account.

Variable.name: orcApplicationName
Variable.Description: IIQ application name the orphan link lives on.

Variable.name: orcIdentityName
Variable.Description: Name of the matched identity to correlate to.

Variable.name: orcIdentityDisplay
Variable.Description: Display name of the matched identity (for messages).

Variable.name: orcStrategy
Variable.Description: Fuzzy match strategy that found this match.

Variable.name: orcScore
Variable.Description: Match score 0-100 from the weighted scoring engine.

Variable.name: orcMatchDetail
Variable.Description: Human-readable description of why the match was made.

Variable.name: orcRequestedBy
Variable.Description: Name of the admin who initiated the approval request.

Variable.name: orcFallbackApproverGroup
Variable.Description: Name of the workgroup that owns the manager-approval work item when no manager can be resolved or the manager would be the requester (no self-approval). Must exist as a workgroup Identity; imported by the plugin as "ServiceAccount-Approvers".

Variable.name: managerName
Variable.Description: Name of the line manager who will own the manager work item.

Variable.name: orcAccountSummary
Variable.Description: Human-readable summary of the orphan account.

Variable.name: approved
Variable.Description: Boolean set by IIQ when an approver actions the work item.

Variable.name: identityConfirmed
Variable.Description: Boolean set by the Identity Confirmation step.

Variable.name: orcIdentityComments
Variable.Description: Free-text comment from the identity confirmation step.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: If true, workflow trace is written to stdout for debugging.

Script.Source: return "Please confirm: is account [" + orcNativeIdentity + "] on [" + orcApplicationName + "] yours?";

entry.value: An administrator believes this account belongs to you. Please confirm or reject.

Field.name: orcMatchDetail
Field.displayName: Why we think this is yours

Approval.owner: script:import sailpoint.object.Identity; org.apache.log4j.Logger olog=org.apache.log4j.Logger.getLogger("com.orphancorrelator.workflow.OrphanCorrelationApproval"); String o=null; if(orcIdentityName!=null){ Identity m=context.getObjectByName(Identity.class,orcIdentityName); Identity mgr=(m!=null)?m.getManager():null; int level=0; while(mgr!=null && level<2){ level++; String mn=mgr.getName(); if(mgr.isInactive()){ olog.warn("OrphanCorrelationApproval: manager ["+mn+"] (level "+level+") is inactive - escalating to their manager."); mgr=mgr.getManager(); continue; } if(mn!=null && mn.equals(orcRequestedBy)){ olog.warn("OrphanCorrelationApproval: manager ["+mn+"] (level "+level+") is the requester - skipping to prevent self-approval."); mgr=mgr.getManager(); continue; } o=mn; break; } } if(o==null){ olog.warn("OrphanCorrelationApproval: no active non-requester manager found within 2 levels for ["+orcIdentityName+"] - routing to fallback ["+orcFallbackApproverGroup+"]."); o=orcFallbackApproverGroup; } if(o==null || context.getObjectByName(Identity.class,o)==null){ olog.error("OrphanCorrelationApproval: approval owner ["+o+"] does not resolve - failing closed to spadmin."); o="spadmin"; } return o;

entry.value: Approve to link this account to the suggested identity. Reject to leave it uncorrelated.

Rule.name: Rule-OrphanAccountSummary
Rule.Description: Builds a one-line orphan-account summary (status, last login, sample access) for the orphan correlation approval. Inputs: nativeIdentity, applicationName.
